dragon-heart.name: Dragon's Heart
dragon-heart.description: The still-warm heart of an ancient wyrm. Radiates immense power.

hydra-eye-charm.name: Hydra Eye Charm
hydra-eye-charm.description: A murky talisman said to let a sorcerer think in many directions at once.

hawksight-talisman.name: Hawksight Talisman
hawksight-talisman.description: A polished lens and bone charm that narrows the world to one perfect shot.

iron-gorget.name: Iron Gorget
iron-gorget.description: A crude iron gorget that protects the throat and steels the will for front-line combat.

focus-pendant.name: Focus Pendant
focus-pendant.description: A crystal pendant that steadies the mind and sharpens spell focus under battle pressure.

pilgrim-medallion.name: Pilgrim Medallion
pilgrim-medallion.description: A worn holy medallion carried by those who walk sacred roads seeking divine guidance.

hunter-locket.name: Hunter's Locket
hunter-locket.description: A small locket holding a tuft of prey fur and a carved arrow for tracking luck.

warlord-pendant.name: Warlord's Pendant
warlord-pendant.description: A pendant stamped with the iron seal of a warlord; grants fierce resolve in the line of battle.

arcane-talisman.name: Arcane Talisman
arcane-talisman.description: A talisman crackling with concentrated spell energy between polished obsidian plates.

blade-locket.name: Blade Locket
blade-locket.description: A locket fitted with a hidden blade and battle-honed runes; luck and killing edge in one.

holy-pendant.name: Holy Pendant
holy-pendant.description: A pure silver pendant consecrated at the Grand Temple, worn by devoted holy warriors.

eagle-torc.name: Eagle Torc
eagle-torc.description: A torc shaped as a diving eagle that sharpens the eyes and steadies the marksman's aim.

berserker-torc.name: Berserker's Torc
berserker-torc.description: A blood-iron torc worn by berserkers who made blood pacts with fury itself.

void-pendant.name: Void Pendant
void-pendant.description: A pendant holding a sliver of void that slowly drains the strength from nearby enemies.

shadow-fang-necklace.name: Shadow Fang Necklace
shadow-fang-necklace.description: A necklace of viper fangs; each hit draws blood back to the wearer's veins.

radiant-reliquary.name: Radiant Reliquary
radiant-reliquary.description: A reliquary holding a saint's fingerbone that radiates soft healing light in battle.

storm-torc.name: Storm Torc
storm-torc.description: A thunder-charged torc that slows enemies caught within the wearer's storm path.

dragonbone-gorget.name: Dragonbone Gorget
dragonbone-gorget.description: A gorget cut from a dragon's neck bone; grants draconic savagery to any warrior.

star-soul-pendant.name: Star Soul Pendant
star-soul-pendant.description: A pendant containing a captured star-soul; rains celestial fire upon those it opposes.

abyssal-medallion.name: Abyssal Medallion
abyssal-medallion.description: A medallion from the deep abyss; each wound feeds the wearer's insatiable hunger.

divine-crown-pendant.name: Divine Crown Pendant
divine-crown-pendant.description: A pendant shaped as a divine crown; grants near-angelic resilience to any true believer.

tempest-amulet.name: Tempest Amulet
tempest-amulet.description: An amulet filled with imprisoned tempest; the air itself becomes a weapon in the wearer's hands.

tin-locket.name: Tin Locket
tin-locket.description: A cheap locket with a faded portrait inside. Sentimental value only.

glass-bead-necklace.name: Glass Bead Necklace
glass-bead-necklace.description: Colorful glass beads strung on twine. Popular with apprentices.

bone-pendant.name: Bone Pendant
bone-pendant.description: A small animal bone carved into a charm. Keeps the bad luck away, maybe.

wooden-holy-symbol.name: Wooden Holy Symbol
wooden-holy-symbol.description: A hand-carved holy symbol. Simple but sincere.

feather-cord.name: Feather Cord
feather-cord.description: A leather cord strung with hawk feathers. Worn by aspiring rangers.

frostbloom-pendant.name: Frostbloom Pendant
frostbloom-pendant.description: A pendant containing a preserved frostbloom. Enhances natural recovery.

cinderport-charm.name: Cinderport Charm
cinderport-charm.description: A charm blessed by Cinderport healers. Wards against fire and poison.

nexus-charm.name: Nexus Charm
nexus-charm.description: A charm from the Nexus Bastion. Stabilizes reality around the wearer.
